title: Purple Trident
description: Changes the trident to match the style of netherite armor with an amethyst armor trim.
body:
**Changes the trident to a more purple version. Thats literally it. I did this so that it could match with netherite armor with an amethyst trim because it looks pretty :)**

See image:

![Purple trident with netherite armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cb5fc10d297c7e27a9006c426aef9422d63c375.png)

I don't know if I'll update this to newer versions. But if something about the trident texture changes to where this resource pack breaks, I will look into it and hopefully update it.
